discussion_comments.comment_body: maybe make constants for "local" and "connected" strings here.  these feel special (like sentinel values) so I think they make sense as constants.

addressed - I put them in resolver.go next the R_Remote, R_RemoteConnected ones
does that seem like a good place for them? I liked that putting them there I didn't have to use a prefix like sstore.LocalRemote

this idea of whether the the remote is the "local" remote or not feels pretty fundamental.  let's move this check into sstore.go (close to the definition of RemoteType).  something like `func (r RemoteType) IsLocal() bool`.  I think the right check is `r.Local && !r.IsSudo()`
